caption:
Williams.

A true dynasty in Formula 1, formed by Frank Williams and Patrick Head almost five decades ago.

Through multiple regulation changes, engine eras, and driver-line ups, the team has endured both the dizzying heights of multiple championships, and the disappointing lows of leaner seasons. Through all of it, the team have remained an iconic and irreplaceable part of the sport, and will continue to do so racing into the new era 👏

caption:
The Indian government has begun working on plans to bring Formula 1 back to the country. Officials recently visited the Buddh International Circuit in Greater Noida, signaling strong interest in reviving the Indian Grand Prix.

The race was last held in 2013 but was dropped due to tax and regulatory issues. Now, with renewed government support, talks are underway to make India a part of the Formula 1 calendar once again.

If successful, this would mark a major comeback for motorsport in India after more than a decade, giving fans hope of seeing the world’s fastest cars on Indian soil once more.
.
.

caption:
Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian are making headlines after being spotted together in Oxfordshire over the weekend. Their private getaway quickly sparked rumors of a possible romance.

Just days later, the two were seen arriving at a Paris hotel, adding fuel to the speculation. While neither has confirmed the relationship, fans and media outlets are calling this one of the most surprising pairings of 2026.
.

author: f1

caption:
The two Italians in the back is literally me 😂

Movie 🎬 : Rush (2013)
In this scene from Rush, Niki Lauda picks up a woman named Marlene while driving, and when he casually tells her that he’s a Formula 1 driver, she doesn’t believe him at all. He doesn’t try to impress her with charm or dramatic stories — instead, he simply explains things in his blunt, analytical way. As he continues driving, you slowly realize who he truly is: not flashy, not charismatic like James Hunt, but calculated, brutally honest, and completely obsessed with precision. When he talks about racing, it’s not about fame or glamour — it’s about risk percentages, control, and perfection. This moment perfectly captures Lauda’s personality and shows how different he was from the typical image of F1 drivers. It’s a subtle yet powerful introduction to the mindset of a man who would go on to become one of the greatest drivers in Formula 1 history.
.
.

author: f1troll

caption:
After years of recovery following his tragic 2013 ski accident, Michael Schumacher is reportedly no longer bedridden. Schumacher continues to receive 24-hour care from his wife Corinna and a dedicated team of nurses and therapists, with costs running into tens of thousands weekly. Only a small inner circle of trusted friends, including former Ferrari boss Jean Todt, are allowed to visit him.

His family has fiercely protected his privacy over the years, even pursuing legal action against those who attempted to exploit his condition through stolen medical records or unauthorized photos. While challenges remain, this latest update offers cautious optimism for fans worldwide who have long awaited news of Schumacher’s recovery.

.
.

caption:
Lewis Hamilton has officially split from his Ferrari race engineer Riccardo Adami after a tough first season with the team. 

The pair had several public disagreements over the radio during races, and Hamilton ended the year without a single podium finish*. 

Ferrari confirmed that Adami will move to a new role in their Driver Academy, while Hamilton awaits the announcement of a new race engineer ahead of the 2026 season.
.
.
.

caption:
Indian-Origin F1 driver Arvid Lindblad driving Sebastian Vettel’s World Championship winning Red Bull Racing RB8 - in VCARB colours. 

The legendary RB8 won the F1 Indian Grand Prix in Delhi NCR back in 2012, en route to winning a historic World Driver’s and Constructors Championship double.

With its naturally aspirated 2.4l V8 engine, it is bound to shake the ground and melt hearts as it fires up once again in Delhi NCR after 14 years!

Don't miss out on the Action, get your Tickets in Early for Best Motorsport Event happening in India 🙌🏻💯🔥

caption:
DELHI, 2026 is about to get LOUD. 🔥 Red Bull Moto Jam is bringing the full chaos package — drifting, FMX, stunt cars, stunt bikes… and topping it off with Indian-origin F1 rookie Arvid Lindblad taking a VCARB-branded F1 car to the streets. 🏎️💨
This isn’t just a demo run it’s India getting a front-row seat to a driver right on the edge of his first F1 season. We’re not watching from highlights anymore… we’re watching it LIVE. 🇮🇳🏁
So who’s pulling up? 👀

#RedBullMotoJam #RedBullIndia #Redbull
